title: Compliance Rules File
description: Schema for the JSON rules files stored in GitLab. One file per standard per version. Loaded by the orchestrator at scan start and passed to the Evaluate & Grade child.

version.description: Version of this ruleset. Increment when any rule changes to preserve historical audit validity.

platform.description: Device platform this ruleset applies to

description.description: Human-readable description of the standard and scope

example.description: CIS Cisco IOS Benchmark v2.0.0 — Level 1 and Level 2 controls

rules.name: Disable IP Source Routing
rules.description: IP source routing allows IP packets to specify their own route. Disabling prevents route manipulation attacks.

rules.name: Disable Service PAD
rules.description: PAD (X.25 Packet Assembler/Disassembler) is an unused legacy service that should be disabled.

rules.name: NTP Server Configured
rules.description: At least one NTP server must be configured for accurate log timestamps and certificate validation.

rules.name: Disable Cisco Discovery Protocol on Edge
rules.description: CDP should not be globally enabled on edge devices as it leaks device information to untrusted segments.
